free_text:
# REQUEST FOR AN EXTENSION OF TIME TO FILE A FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE REPORT

Requester: Rohit Khanna. Report type: Annual (CY 2025). The filer requested a 90-day extension. Ethics Committee use notes indicate the requested total days exceed 90 and the request was granted on 02/21/2026. Copy sent to Legislative Resource Center, FD-PB CHOB, and Chairman Hakeem Jeffries. The scan is upside down. No transaction rows appear on this extension-request page.

uncertainties.note: Source OCR is upside down; text was transcribed from the local rotated OCR/page image.
Audit repair: normalized nonstandard page_type 'extension_request' to schema value 'letter'.
